headline: Trump floated the idea of a 15% government stake in a massive railroad merger
summary: Trump did not name any specific companies, but Union Pacific's pending acquisition of Norfolk Southern is the only known railroad deal currently in progress.

raw.headline: Trump floated the idea of a 15% government stake in a massive railroad merger

headline: Brookfield Infrastructure Could Quietly Cash In on the Coming Rail Megamerger
summary: North America’s freight rail map is about to be redrawn. The proposed merger of Union Pacific (NYSE: UNP) with Norfolk Southern (NYSE: NSC) would create the first transcontinental railroad, and the Surface Transportation Board review will almost certainly require divestitures of regional lines, yards, and equipment. Investors fixate on the operators. The more interesting question ... Brookfield Infrastructure Could Quietly Cash In on the Coming Rail Megamerger

headline: How rail mega-merger moved ahead, and STB avoided making history
summary: The Surface Transportation Board gave conditional approval of the Union Pacific-Norfolk Southern revised merger application, but asked for more information. The post How rail mega-merger moved ahead, and STB avoided making history appeared first on FreightWaves.
